title: Exclude Soft-Deleted Metrics from Merge Screen
story: As a DataTools Pro user merging metrics, I want the merge screen to only show active metrics and exclude any I've previously deleted, so that I don't see duplicate entries from soft-deleted records.
description: The merge metric screen was displaying duplicate entries because soft-deleted metrics were being included in the query results. The merge screen query needs to filter out soft-deleted records.
acceptance_criteria: Soft-deleted metrics are excluded from the merge screen dropdown/list
Only active (non-deleted) metrics appear as merge targets
Previously deleted metrics do not cause apparent duplicates
ux_changes: Merge screen no longer displays soft-deleted metrics, eliminating apparent duplicate entries.
middleware_changes: Updated the merge screen query to filter out soft-deleted metric records.
implementation_notes: The fix was a query filter addition to exclude records where the soft-delete flag is set.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the query filter on staging.
